title: AgentShift Intermediate Representation (IR)
description: Universal agent model for cross-platform agent portability. Represents agents from OpenClaw, Claude Code, Copilot, Bedrock, and Vertex AI in a single canonical format.

ir_version.description: IR schema version. Always '1.0' for this revision.

name.description: Canonical slug identifier for the agent. Lowercase, hyphens only. e.g. 'pregnancy-companion'.

description.description: Human-readable summary of what the agent does and when to invoke it. Used as a skill trigger description for Claude Code and OpenClaw.

version.description: Semantic version of this agent definition. e.g. '1.0.0'.

author.description: Author or owner of this agent definition. Free text.

homepage.description: Optional URL for documentation or the tool this agent wraps.

persona.description: The agent's identity and behavioral instructions — the system prompt layer.

system_prompt.description: The full system / instruction prompt passed to the model at session start. Maps to: OpenClaw SKILL.md body, Claude Code CLAUDE.md, Copilot system_prompt, Bedrock instruction, Vertex AI agent instruction.

personality_notes.description: Human-readable prose describing tone, style, and personality. Informational only; may be embedded in system_prompt.

language.description: Primary language for responses. BCP-47 code. e.g. 'en', 'es'.

tools.description: Capabilities / tools available to the agent. Covers MCP tools, OpenAPI action groups, shell commands, and built-in platform tools.

knowledge.description: Knowledge sources the agent consults — local files, vector stores, URLs, or databases.

triggers.description: Conditions that activate the agent: cron schedules, webhooks, messages, or platform events.

constraints.description: Platform limits, guardrails, and behavioral restrictions.

max_instruction_chars.description: Maximum character length of the system prompt (varies by platform). Bedrock: 4000. Copilot: ~32k. Vertex: 8000+.

supported_os.description: Operating systems this agent can run on. Maps to OpenClaw 'os' frontmatter field.

required_bins.description: CLI binaries that must be present (e.g. ['gh', 'curl']). Maps to OpenClaw metadata.openclaw.requires.bins.

any_required_bins.description: At least one of these binaries must be present. Maps to OpenClaw metadata.openclaw.requires.anyBins.

required_config_keys.description: OpenClaw config keys that must be set. e.g. ['channels.slack'].

guardrails.description: Named safety guardrails to apply. e.g. ['no-diagnose', 'no-prescribe', 'no-harmful-content'].

topic_restrictions.description: Topics the agent must refuse. Free text. Maps to Bedrock/Copilot guardrails.

install.description: Installation instructions for agent dependencies. Maps to OpenClaw metadata.openclaw.install.

metadata.description: Source provenance and target platform annotations. Preserved across conversions.

source_platform.description: Platform this IR was originally parsed from.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this IR was first created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent modification.

source_file.description: Path or URI of the original source file (e.g. '~/.openclaw/skills/weather/SKILL.md').

emoji.description: Display emoji for the agent. Maps to OpenClaw metadata.openclaw.emoji.

platform_extensions.description: Platform-specific data that has no IR equivalent. Keyed by platform slug. Preserved round-trip.

Tool.description: A capability the agent can invoke — an MCP tool, OpenAPI endpoint, shell command, or platform built-in.

description.description: What this tool does and when to use it.

kind.description: Tool protocol type. 'mcp' = Model Context Protocol server. 'openapi' = REST/OpenAPI action group (Bedrock/Copilot). 'shell' = CLI subprocess. 'builtin' = platform-native tool (Bash, Read, WebSearch in Claude Code). 'function' = LLM function-calling definition.

parameters.description: JSON Schema object describing tool input parameters. Maps to MCP inputSchema, OpenAPI requestBody, or function call parameters.

endpoint.description: For 'openapi' kind: base URL. For 'mcp' kind: server URI or command.

platform_availability.description: Platforms on which this tool is available. Empty = all platforms.

env_var.description: Environment variable holding the credential. e.g. 'SLACK_BOT_TOKEN'.

KnowledgeSource.description: A data source the agent reads from for grounding.

name.description: Logical name for this knowledge source. e.g. 'week-by-week'.

path.description: File path, directory path, or URI. May use ~ for home dir. e.g. '~/.openclaw/skills/pregnancy-companion/knowledge/week-by-week.md'.

load_mode.description: 'always' = inject into every session. 'on_demand' = agent reads when needed. 'indexed' = embedded in vector store.

Trigger.description: An event or schedule that activates the agent.

cron_expr.description: Standard cron expression (5-field). e.g. '0 9 * * 1' = Monday 9am. Required when kind='cron'.

every.description: Human-readable interval shorthand. e.g. '30m', '2h', '1d'. Alternative to cron_expr.

message.description: Prompt or instruction injected when the trigger fires. Maps to OpenClaw cron payload.message.

webhook_path.description: URL path for webhook triggers. e.g. '/webhooks/github'.

session_target.description: Session context for the triggered run. 'isolated' = fresh session each time.

TriggerDelivery.description: Where to send the trigger's output.

to.description: Destination identifier: chat_id, user_id, channel_id, email address, etc.

account_id.description: OpenClaw account/bot identifier for multi-account setups.

InstallStep.description: One installation method for a dependency. Multiple methods give fallback options.

id.description: Unique id for this install method. e.g. 'brew', 'apt', 'go', 'npm'.

bins.description: Binary names installed by this step.

label.description: Human-readable label for this install option.
